Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my friends' powerful[n]emotions flowing into my heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}All I can do right now is pray, but whatever it is, man...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Don't worry about a thing. I know you can do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 2 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I know you're facing a difficult task, somewhere out there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 2 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But I truly believe that you can overcome any obstacle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Something frightful is going on... But we're not giving up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That's right, dear... We have to be strong for {f 4 2}-chan...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Something crazy's going on here... But I know you're out there doing all you can, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm not gonna lose hope. I learned that from you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I'm okay right now... And it's because you gave me the courage to stand on my own![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 66 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Oh god, I'm freaking out here! But... I know he's doing his best out there too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 66 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I don't even know what he looks like, but I know he's okay... I can feel it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun... I know you're trying to stay focused...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You were there when I needed you... I hope I can do the same...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun... Can you believe what's going on?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I know you must be doing everything you can, so I will, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Everyone else is scared, but not me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}You showed me how to be tough![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 6 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I am here for you... like you were there for me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}What on earth made me think of you at a time like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Well, I suppose you did teach me a thing or two about trust...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You were the one who taught me that runnin' away never solves nothin'...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}And I bet you're somewhere out there fightin' the good fight right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I'll take on any challenge that comes my way without passing blame...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}You taught me that, {f 4 1}... I bet you're fighting right now too, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 2 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}You saved me, {f 4 2}-kun. I was so blind before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 2 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I'm sure you've got things under control, right? You always do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I know I'm not the only one who's suffered... You've endured a lot, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 65 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But you can't just give up... You taught me that.[n]{f 1 1}
